# Test fixtures

Sample badge + business card images for testing the vision extraction
pipeline (`lib/providers/vision/*` → `reconcileFields` → `mergedFields`).

All web-sourced files are from Wikimedia Commons under permissive licenses
(CC BY 2.0 / CC BY-SA 4.0 / CC0 / public domain). Attribution required for
CC BY / CC BY-SA — keep this file alongside them when redistributing.

## badges/

| File | Source | License | Good for |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `fake-badge-sarah-chen.png` | Generated by `scripts/make-fake-badge.ts` | n/a | Deterministic baseline — exact fields known, useful for unit tests |
| `name-badges.jpg` | [File:Name_Badges.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Name_Badges.jpg) by Akaiemma | CC BY-SA 4.0 | Multiple identical badges (Milly Francis, Dental Nurse, Smiles Dentists) — tests dedupe logic |
| `employee-name-badge.jpg` | [File:Employee_Name_Badge.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Employee_Name_Badge.jpg) | CC BY-SA 4.0 | Real conference badge with lanyard, QR code, attendee tag (Paul Smith, Stictly Ltd Manager, 4th Online Services Conference) — also has a real-world OCR ambiguity: "Stictly" is almost certainly "Strictly" |
| `wikiconf-uk-2012.jpg` | [File:WikiConference_UK_2012_-_Badges.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:WikiConference_UK_2012_-_Badges.jpg) by James Forrester | CC BY 2.0 | Cluttered scene — badges on a table at a distance. Tests how the model handles low-legibility input (should likely return "not readable" / empty fields) |

## cards/

| File | Source | License | Good for |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `choe-kwangmo.jpg` | [File:Choe_Kwangmo's_business_card,_Jul_2016.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Choe_Kwangmo%27s_business_card,_Jul_2016.jpg) | CC0 | Clean modern card — name, org, mobile, email, website. Best general-purpose test image. |
| `diplomatic-first-secretary.jpg` | [File:Business_Card_-_First_Secretary_(Press_and_Information).jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Business_Card_-_First_Secretary_(Press_and_Information).jpg) | CC BY-SA 4.0 | Diplomatic card (Premil Ratnayake, Embassy of Sri Lanka in Bonn) — title spans multiple lines, address + phone separated by column |
| `british-library.jpg` | [File:British_Library_business_card.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:British_Library_business_card.jpg) | Public domain | Back of card — only contains tagline "THE WORLD'S KNOWLEDGE". Tests "no extractable contact info" handling. |
| `andres-rincon.jpg` | [File:Andres_rincon.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Andres_rincon.jpg) | CC BY-SA 4.0 | Brand mockup — logo only, no contact text. Tests "image has nothing to extract" handling. |
| `arnold-wurgaft.jpg` | [File:Arnold_Wurgaft.jpg](https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Arnold_Wurgaft.jpg) | CC BY-SA 4.0 | Historical Russian Cyrillic card (Арнольдъ Давыдовичъ Вургафтъ). Tests non-Latin script handling. |

## Adding more fixtures

Pull from Wikimedia Commons (CC-licensed) by file ID:

```bash
curl -sSL -A 'aicapture-fixtures/1.0' -o tests/fixtures/badges/foo.jpg \
  'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/X/XX/Foo.jpg'
```

Always record the source URL + license in the table above so attribution stays
linked to the file.
